practical_and_experimental_content: Demonstrate file management including backup, restore, and managing folders/files.
Demonstrate the various methods of creating slides.
Demonstrate the steps to add animations to slides.
Demonstrate how to format slides effectively.
Demonstrate the implementation of security measures and application of security to computers and peripherals.
Produce an algorithm for a given problem in pseudo code using a variety of structures (totalling and counting).
Produce loops and decision making in a program (e.g., Repeat...until, if...then...else).
Use a dry run with a trace table and test data to understand the behaviour of code.
Produce a truth table for a given logic circuit.
Design a simple logic circuit to provide a solution to a written logical statement of a problem.
Create Web Pages using templates (HTML and Design windows).
Import text and pictures into a web page.

topics.topic: 11.6 Social and Economic Impact of Computers
subtopics: 11.6.1 Effects of Computer use on people and organisation
11.6.2 Maintenance of integrity of data and privacy
11.6.4 Threats to computer security and measures to combat them

practical_and_experimental_content: Describe and use tools to design programs and algorithms.

subtopics: 12.3.1 Project planning, database development and systems development
practical_and_experimental_content: Demonstrate practical skills in software project planning.
Use simple programming (e.g., SQL, Pascal, C++) to develop database systems.
Write a comprehensive computer system report relating to the stages of system analysis and design.
Demonstrate the final working System Product (software) to solve a specific problem.
